since_last: 52% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.43%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +0.33% · Gold +1.42% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 52% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.43%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.43%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +17.15%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +17.15%, QCOM +7.91%, AMAT +7.65%, LSCC +7.17%, LRCX +6.97%. Laggards: BABA -2.65%, DELL -2.57%, APP -2.25%, PLTR -1.94%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.43% at $158.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
